flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Temple University rose 32% between 2021 and 2024 ($17.4k → $23.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Temple University rose 19% between 2006 and 2009 ($18.2k → $21.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Temple University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Temple University are 19% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($63.7k vs $53.8k).
